name: WFGY
description: WFGY is an open-source AI Troubleshooting Atlas for RAG, agents, and real-world AI workflows. Includes the 16-problem map, Global Debug Card, and WFGY 3.0. ⭐ Star to help more builders find this repo.
summaryZh: WFGY is an open-source AI Troubleshooting Atlas for RAG, agents, and real-world AI workflows. Includes the 16-problem map, Global Debug Card, and WFGY 3.0. ⭐ Star to help more builders find this repo. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
